title: French Coconut Crumble
description: A classic French dessert with a twist of coconut and a crumbly topping.

ingredients.name: crumle
ingredients.notes: oat and brown sugar crumble mixture

instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together coconut milk, sugar, eggs, and smoky.
Pour the mixture into a 9x9-inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together flour and melted butter to form a crumbly mixture.
Add the crumle mixture on top of the coconut mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the filling is set.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
